hero.illustrationAlt: Realistic black and white illustration of a moth with wings spread open, seen from the front, with fine details on the wings and antennae. Art by @piratezyte

about.title: About Me
about.bio1: UI/UX Designer and Front-End Developer with a passion for building interfaces that connect aesthetics and functionality. I believe good design is invisible — it guides the user effortlessly.
about.bio2_title: Who am I when I'm not designing interfaces??
about.bio2:
I am a cisgender LGBTQIA+ woman and mostly use she/her pronouns, but I really don't mind if you use any other. :)

I love playing all kinds of games, from tabletop RPGs to the fateful League of Legends.

I also love animals because I've always lived with them, especially cats!

cats.maru: Maru, a striped tabby cat with a white belly, sitting on a black office chair with a serious expression
cats.niro: Niro, a fluffy long-haired gray and white Persian cat, resting calmly on a wooden shelf
cats.morgana: Morgana, a black cat with bright yellow-green eyes, curiously sitting inside a cardboard box

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: Have a project in mind, want to talk about design and technology, or even cats and games? I’m always open to have a nice chat!
